purpose: Repair V19 KcsA evidence readout so it reads V16 zero-MD target_rows schema and correctly carries the soluble-core leakage guard into the KcsA membrane/pore evidence decision.
repaired_issue: V19 saw pore/filter, transmembrane, membrane, and interface evidence, but clean-abstained because it looked for V16 role rows under target_results instead of target_rows. The repair supports both schemas and treats positive_role_context_found/role_classification_passed_targets as the explicit soluble-core misclassification guard when no forbidden violations exist.
